1.name: Alignment
1.theme: Alignment between thought, word and action

3.name: Heart vs Ego
3.theme: Giving without expecting anything in return

awakened.name: THE AWAKENED BEING
awakened.desc: You live in deep alignment with your essence. Your actions are guided by unconditional love, awakened consciousness and inner coherence. You are a source of inspiration for those around you.
awakened.quote: "Be the light you wish to see in the world." — Gandhi

awakening.name: THE AWAKENING BEING
awakening.desc: Your heart guides your steps but ego still intervenes at times. You are on the path of inner awakening with growing awareness. Your areas of tension are your most beautiful growth grounds.
awakening.quote: "Growth is uncomfortable. That's where the magic happens." — Anonymous

tension.name: THE BEING IN TENSION
tension.desc: You feel an inner tension between your protective ego and your deep aspiration for love and authenticity. This pull is a strong signal: it's time to go inward to choose consciously.
tension.quote: "Between stimulus and response there is a space. In that space lies our freedom." — V. Frankl

dominant.name: THE DOMINANT EGO
dominant.desc: The ego occupies a large place in your life. Your fears, defenses and need for control color your relationships and choices. This is not a judgment — it is an invitation to approach yourself with kindness and courage.
dominant.quote: "What you refuse to see in yourself, life will keep showing you." — Carl Jung

actionItems.daily2: 🧘 5 min conscious breathing before starting your day

actionItems.weekly1: 📓 Review your journal — spot recurring patterns
actionItems.weekly2: 💬 Have one authentic conversation you've been avoiding

actionItems.monthly2: 🎯 Set one intention per pillar to develop
actionItems.monthly3: 🤝 Share your progress with a trusted person
